category_sources: source_facts.description says bsdmake is the BSD version of the Make build tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is bsdmake; source_facts.description identifies the BSD make tool.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official Apple open-source bsdmake repository; README is the available official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/apple-oss-distributions/bsdmake; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies BSD make; source_facts.executables and current_curation.tags indicate CLI usage.
